seoTitle: Durack vs East Arnhem — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Durack vs East Arnhem: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Durack and East Arnhem.
heading: Durack vs East Arnhem — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Durack, Northern Territory and East Arnhem, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Arnhem has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Durack (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Durack or East Arnhem safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Durack has a flood risk score of 46/100, while East Arnhem scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Durack scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. East Arnhem scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Durack or East Arnhem?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Arnhem has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
